description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 15th, a test vehicle operating in manual mode was traveling South-bound on Semiconductor Drive in Santa Clara when an 
individual threw an object at the test vehicle, causing cosmetic damage to the test vehicle’s hood.  No injuries were reported, and police 
were notified of the incident.
